title: Aachen, North Rhine-Westphalia — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Aachen, North Rhine-Westphalia: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Aachen is a city in North Rhine-Westphalia with a population of 249,000. Charlemagne’s imperial city at the crossroads of three countries, a historic university town with a stunning cathedral and a vibrant student life.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
